title: Research summary → article (text chain)
description: Two text nodes: upstream research JSON `data.summary` maps into the next lens via edge `source_output_key: "data.summary"`. Requires two published text lenses and Platform credits or Local BYOK.

title: Prompt → Fal image
description: First node produces a prompt string; second node uses a Fal-capable model (`fal-ai/...`). Browser run requires Platform credits or Local BYOK with Fal. Per-node `model_id` on the image node should select the Fal model.

title: Image URL → vision caption
description: Upstream node exposes `url` (or `data.imageUrl`); edge uses dotted `source_output_key` into a vision-capable text lens. Requires Platform credits or Local BYOK and a vision model on the second node.

title: Two branches → merge concat
description: Two text nodes feed a merge/synthesis node with `merge: concat` in node config (engine-supported). Same funding as other text chains.
